original.description: Original transaction description as it appears at the FI site.

simple.description:
The transaction description that appears at the FI site may not be self-explanatory, i.e., the source, purpose of the transaction may not be evident.

Yodlee attempts to simplify and make the transaction meaningful to the consumer, and this simplified transaction description is provided in the simple description field.

Note - The simple description field is available only in the United States, Canada, United Kingdom, and India.

consumer.description: The description of the transaction as defined by the consumer.  The consumer can define or provide more details of the transaction  in this field.
